dialogos.texto_en: The view is as good as its reputation.\nDon't you think so? Futaro!
Y-yeah, I do.
(...It really looks luxurious.\n The view is certainly spectacular. \n Don't we look out of place though?)
Hey, what would you like to order, Futaro?\nWhich dish should I order, hmmm?
I'm going to choose...um...
(Oh no! These all so pricey!\n As expected of a luxury resort hotel!)
(But if I'm stingy here,\n won't it embarrass Nino?)
(If I were to order, coffee would be the cheapest...\n But I can't drink coffee because it's too bitter.)
Futaro?
I'll have iced tea.
Okay, I'll have tropical fruit iced tea.
(That one seems to be pretty expensive too...!)
Ah, are you perhaps worried about money?
Oooh...
I'll put it on the room tab.\nDon't worry about it.
...You can do that too?
(It helps that I don't have to worry about money,\n but I'm so out of place I can't bear it!\n How can I relax in a situation like this!)
Hey, Futaro? You've been acting strange since we arrived.\nIs something bothering you?
Oh, um...\nI'm sorry to say this,\nbut I'm not used to places like this.
To be honest, I'm worried that I might mess up something\nand embarrass you...
You don't have to worry about that.\nJust be yourself.
Even so, when it comes to etiquette I'm clueless.\nThat's why I'm so nervous.
Hey, Futaro?\nI'm really happy when I'm with you!
Huh?\nWh-what now all of a sudden?
Just listen.
Having you by my side\nmakes me feel like nothing else matters.
Everyone gave us their blessing when we started dating...\nThere's nothing more I could wish for.
To be honest,\nI thought there would be more trouble.
(After I confessed to Nino,\n there was an awkward atmosphere\n between the quintuplets for a while.)
(But, by the time winter had really set in,\n it had disappeared...)
I haven't asked for the details,\nbut you guys did have some issues.
It was inevitable.\nEveryone was really mad at me about us dating.
But, because we were serious about it,\nI could clash with my sisters,\nand the five of us could still be together like this.
If we weren't serious about our feelings,\nwe would have gotten seperated by them.
(Looking at Nino's face,\n I noticed that she is being honest with me. So, it's\n really true that there's no trouble between them.)
You don't have to worry about anything, Futaro.\nInstead, be proud that you made us all serious \nabout dating you.
Proud?\nI haven't done anything.
Teehee, that's right.\nJust be yourself, Futaro.
That's what I like about you.
......\nN-Nino, please don't\ndo anything embarrassing in public.
Teehee, I got it.\nI won't trouble you, Futaro.
It's our first trip as a couple.\nWe have to make a lot of good memories.
There are a lot of things I want to do!\nI brought a new swimsuit to plunge into the Okinawan sea,\nbut%p-2;――
I want to go shopping and do some sightseeing,\nthat's why I need you by my side.
You're quite greedy.
(As for things I want to do,\n if I could kiss Nino during this trip,\n I would have no complaints...)
(No, rushing into things would be a mistake.\n I'll try not be too eager and wait for my chance.)
Of course I'm gonna be greedy.\nBecause once the trip is over,\nyou're going to Tokyo, Futaro.
I don't intend to stop you from moving there,\nand I understand what your goals are...
Still, I'll be lonely and unable to see you for a \nwhile, so I want to make sure I store enough memories\nwith you during this trip.
What's that supposed to mean?\nStoring memories?
For example...
What the—?
I want to remember your warmth and touch, Futaro,\nso that I can always recall your presence\nlike you're by my side.
...I-is that so?
You should take advantage of this situation too.\nMake sure you spend a lot of quality time with me.
Okay...
And also, let's make memories.
I want to make lots of memories on this trip,\nso that I can remember them while we're apart.
That'll help us get through tough times.
Nino...
(Long-distance relationships really do make me anxious.\n I should show her the kind of man I can be\n on this trip, to put her at ease.)
(This is where it counts, Uesugi Futaro...!)
